turns.speaker: ivr
turns.text: Welcome to Acme Recoveries. Please hold for the next available agent.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is Sam from Acme Recoveries. I'm calling about your account today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your outstanding balance is 1,240 dollars and it is overdue, so we need to sort this out now.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I don't even know if that's right. This is a complaint, I want to complain about how often you people call me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: If you don't pay today, we can have you arrested. It's that simple.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: That is outrageous, you can't say that to me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Look, just pay 500 now and I'll call you back tomorrow to arrange the rest.
